title: Glassy Jelly Lamb Skewers
description: A festive and flavorful Croatian dish featuring lamb loin chops, served with a sweet and savory glassy jelly. Perfect for a dinner gathering.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together red wine, olive oil, garlic, parsley, lemon juice, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb loin chops to the bowl and toss to coat.
Thread 3-4 pieces of lamb onto each skewer.
Grill the skewers for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
While the skewers are cooking, prepare the glassy jelly.
To make the glassy jelly, combine 250g of sugar, 250g of water, and 1 tsp of red pepper flakes in a saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the jelly has thickened.
Remove the skewers from the grill and brush with the glassy jelly.
Serve the skewers immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
